title: 'Head wounds, heavy bleeding..': US troops recall chaos after deadly Iranian drone strike on Kuwait base
summary_full: Survivors of a deadly drone strike in Kuwait have challenged the Pentagon's narrative, stating their unit was unprepared and lacked fortified defenses. The attack, which killed six service members and injured over 20, occurred at a lightly protected facility. Soldiers described the chaos and their efforts to save lives amidst the destruction.
